title: poa laxa var. tremula
intro: Poa laxa var. tremula, also known as tremulous meadow-grass, is a variety of grass that belongs to the Poa genus. It is a type of herb that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa laxa var. tremula include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Poa laxa var. tremula can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion by steeping the dried plant in hot water, or as a tincture by soaking the plant in a solvent such as ethanol or glycerin.
